about.title: About Me
description: I am a passionate 8th-semester Computer Systems Engineering student at the Instituto Tecnológico de Tijuana (ITT). My vision of technology is not limited to writing code; I seek to understand and master the entire ecosystem, from the base hardware to cloud deployment. This curiosity drove me to design, assemble, and manage my own bare-metal server (homelab), which I use as my personal laboratory to master Fog Computing architectures, Docker orchestration, Linux systems administration, and network security.

I stand out for my capacity for self-directed learning and my focus on "Deep Work", which allows me to immerse myself in solving complex challenges during highly focused sessions. My short- and medium-term professional goal is to consolidate my profile as a DevOps and Full-Stack Engineer, mastering the development of scalable architectures.

Currently, I am actively seeking a Junior-level job opportunity or professional internship where I can contribute my creativity, my problem-solving work ethic, and my adaptability, while continuing to learn from experienced teams to build solutions that generate real impact.

homelab_details.title: Homelab and Infrastructure
homelab_details.description: One of my greatest strengths as a developer is my deep understanding of the environment where code executes. To achieve this, I have designed, assembled, and managed my own high-performance local server. This allows me to have a real testing environment, orchestrate containers, and eliminate dependency on third-party hosting.
specs: Motherboard: GIGABYTE B650 Eagle AX AM5 ATX (Wi-Fi 6E)
RAM: 64GB DDR5 Total (32GB Kingston Fury + 32GB Corsair)
Storage: 1TB SSD Kingston NV3 / 4TB HDD Seagate Barracuda
Power Supply: MSI Mag A850GL PCIe5 850W (80+ Gold)
homelab_details.plan_desc: Future migration to a full Rack structure, integration of managed switches, and UPS backup systems for high availability.
homelab_details.orchestration_desc: Database hosting, Docker container deployment, secure tunnel management with Cloudflare Zero Trust, and dedicated servers (Minecraft, Factorio, Terraria) for community management.

about_details.title: Get to Know Me Better
story: My name is Brian Guadalupe Tellez Escobar, and I am a passionate Computer Systems Engineering student. My technological story began driven by a genuine curiosity: I have never settled for just knowing how to use things, I always want to understand how they work from the inside out.

This same curiosity led me to build my own Homelab. What started as a simple hobby setting up dedicated servers to play with my friends (Minecraft, Terraria), quickly escalated into my own cloud architecture laboratory. Through intensive self-learning, I immersed myself in Linux systems administration, leaving the comfort of the GUI to master the command line, manage local networks, and expose services securely with Cloudflare tunnels.

To me, programming has never been an academic obligation or a work burden. I see it purely as the ultimate medium to bring my ideas to life. If I can imagine a system, a platform, or a solution, code is simply the brick I use to build it.

sgv_details.title: Housing Management System
sgv_details.description: Comprehensive SaaS (Multi-tenant) to modernize residential area administration. It allows local administrators to maintain strict financial control and residents to achieve real-time communication.

architecture_items.name: Multi-Tenant Architecture
architecture_items.desc: SuperAdmin Dashboard to register condominiums as isolated clients with unique access codes.

architecture_items.name: Financial Control
architecture_items.desc: Mass generation of charges, fines, and payment records that dynamically update balances.

architecture_items.name: Auditing (Logs)
architecture_items.desc: Immutable log that tracks balance modifications, ensuring full financial transparency.

architecture_items.name: Support and Tickets
architecture_items.desc: Asynchronous support module to report residential incidents directly to the executive board.

clips_details.title: ClipsBanana
clips_details.description: Self-hosted streaming platform focused on video game clips. Integrates modular processing to bypass size limits on reverse proxies, using AI for quick cataloging.

architecture_items.name: Chunked Uploads
architecture_items.desc: Block-based upload algorithm to accept massive 10GB+ videos bypassing Cloudflare limitations.

architecture_items.name: HTTP 206 Streaming
architecture_items.desc: Controller that honors Range Requests, streaming partial video and mitigating server memory consumption.

architecture_items.name: Asynchronous Metric
architecture_items.desc: 5-second active iteration logic sequence in the player before certifying a view as authentic.

ourocore_details.title: OuroCore Web
ourocore_details.description: The static corporate digital hub of our consulting and automation firm, deployed extremely optimized under Nginx Alpine.

architecture_items.name: Hybrid Architecture
architecture_items.desc: Successful transition from a monolith to a static orchestration stacking Nginx over Docker for near-zero LCP speeds.

architecture_items.name: Dynamic Catalog
architecture_items.desc: Pure front-end generation of modal components to bypass reloads and fluidify technical indexing.

architecture_items.name: Zero Trust Security
architecture_items.desc: Closed network service exposed to the public ecosystem exclusively via Cloudflare reverse tunnels.

bots_details.title: Discord Ecosystem
bots_details.description: An audio orchestration network for Discord. TellezSound provides an OAuth2 Web Platform to inject custom audio live into voice chats (bypassing micro-payments), joined by TellezBot to fetch audio from external sources.

architecture_items.name: Normalized Streaming
architecture_items.desc: Asynchronous bypass and transcoding applying EBU R128 standard (loudnorm at -14 LUFS) instantly.

architecture_items.name: Phase Two Retrieval
architecture_items.desc: Implementation of Two-Step Fetching in TellezBot that resolves the stream stream right before playback.

architecture_items.name: Secured Panel
architecture_items.desc: Jinja rendered views with Discord SSO strictly restrict listed files according to predefined Guild proper RBAC.

portafolio_details.title: Web Personal Portfolio
portafolio_details.description: Building this site meant going far beyond a simple web template. Natively designed as an interactive App under React Server Components emitting pure HTML/CSS, it represents a structured manifestation of my capabilities as a Full-Stack Developer.

architecture_items.name: Static Site Generation
architecture_items.desc: Modular export where all rendering happens during the build phase (Node Container), delivering pre-generated optimized assets directly through Nginx maximizing LCP.

architecture_items.name: Custom i18n
architecture_items.desc: Mathematical construction of a context without heavy native libraries, syncing dictionaries transparently with Local Storage in real time.

architecture_items.name: Multi-Page Architecture
architecture_items.desc: Organic scalability adapting the nested router to display enriched profiles for each project without slowing down the main root render.
